positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos.tptp

cnf(u47,axiom,

    ~rabbit(X0) | animal(X0)).

    ~squirrel(X0) | animal(X0)).

    spotted_near_campus(sK0)).

    ~turtle(rockie)).

    calm(rockie)).

    ~animal(X0) | squirrel(X0) | rabbit(X0) | ~spotted_near_campus(X0)).

    turtle(sK0)).

    animal(sK0)).

cnf(u36,axiom,

    ~squirrel(X0) | skittish(X0) | ~spotted_near_campus(X0)).

cnf(u31,axiom,
    ~turtle(X0) | animal(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define cute(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
